# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover accurate, real-time values for every Adopt Me pet and item. Trusted by thousands of players for fair trades. Start winning trades today!

### Method
https://example.com/method
Learn our proven methodology for tracking Adopt Me values. Transparent, data-driven, and updated daily to keep you ahead in every trade you make.

### Item Directory
https://example.com/directory
Search our complete directory of Adopt Me pets, vehicles, and items with live values. Find exactly what you need in seconds and trade smarter than ever.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions or spot an outdated value? Reach out to our team. We respond quickly to help Adopt Me players trade with confidence every single day.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Conbat value

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - Conbat value

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - Conbat value

Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.
